pr.title: feat(replit): Replit support and explicit agent rules for replit.com/~
pr.body:
## Summary Recreates Replit platform support on a clean branch from current `develop` (post PR #154), without bot `version_def.h` / version-lock churn. Adds everything needed to import and run the project on [Replit](https://replit.com/~), plus explicit **Replit Agent** policy in `replit.md` aligned with **CLAUDE.md**, **AGENTS.md**, **`.cursor/rules/`**, and **`.coderabbit.yaml`**. ## Changes - **`.replit`** — compile/run commands, `cpp-clang14`, Nix `stable-24_05`, pointer to `replit.md` policy - **`replit.nix`** — Nix packages (gcc, gnumake, nasm, sqlite, openssl, SDL2, libcunit, cmake, …) - **`replit.md`** — full Replit Agent rules (versioning, lock system, `.ver` authoring, `DEV_VERSION`/`GM`, `git merge --no-ff`, build/test, review alignment) - **`docs/replit.md`** — longer Replit documentation - **`nix/deps.json`** — JSON manifest of dependencies and profiles - **`flake.nix`** — local `nix develop` shells (optional; not Replit runtime) - **Docs cross-links** — `README.md`, `docs/dependencies.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `.coderabbit.yaml` ## Versioning - New root entry: `version/entries/4_1_0_replit_support.ver` (`PRERELEASE=1`, `DEV_VERSION=3`) - Does **not** commit `userland/shell/version_def.h` or `version/locked/**` (CI / Version lock on merge) ## Supersedes Replaces the prior draft on the old branch history ([#164](https://github.com/BPForbes/Bailey-Forbes-Flinstone/pull/164)); please close #164 in favor of this PR if GitHub still shows both.
  
## Summary by CodeRabbit ## Release Notes * **New Features** * Added Replit app import and execution support with Nix-backed environment configuration. * **Documentation** * Added comprehensive Replit integration guide with setup and usage instructions. * Updated project documentation with dependency mapping and cross-platform support information. * **Chores** * Bumped version to 4.1.0 BUILD 3. * Added Nix flake configuration for multi-platform development shells. [![Review Change Stack](https://storage.googleapis.com/coderabbit_public_assets/review-stack-in-coderabbit-ui.svg)](https://app.coderabbit.ai/change-stack/BPForbes/Bailey-Forbes-Flinstone/pull/165?utm_source=github_walkthrough&utm_medium=github&utm_campaign=change_stack)
pr.author: BPForbes
